caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or interview titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK." The setting appears to be a clothing store, as evidenced by the racks of clothes and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the environment. The man is engaged in conversation, gesturing with his hands as he speaks, indicating an animated discussion. The overall atmosphere suggests a casual yet professional setting, possibly aimed at sharing insights or advice related to business or entrepreneurship.
